fields.name: name
fields.description: The text displayed for this list item.

fields.description: Identifier for a related, pending item.

fields.label: Which fields appear in the form?
fields.description: Entity fields rendered as inputs inside the modal form.

detailPattern.label: Layout pattern
detailPattern.description: Pattern used to arrange the form body

detailSlot.description: UI slot the modal renders into

icon.description: Lucide icon name shown next to the modal title.

title.label: What should the modal heading say?
title.description: Heading displayed at the top of the modal.
title.synonyms: modal title, dialog heading, panel title, form title

mode.label: Is this for creating or editing?
mode.description: create = blank form; edit = pre-filled from the selected row.
mode.synonyms: form mode, create or edit, new or update, add or modify

events.name: Request
events.description: A request for confirmation before proceeding.

events.name: Confirm
events.description: Indicates the user has approved the action.

events.name: Cancel
events.description: Indicates the action was cancelled by the user.

events.name: Close
events.description: Indicates the user dismissed the confirmation.

events.name: ConfirmAction load failed
events.description: Indicates failure to load the confirmation action.

events.description: Indicates the confirmation action has been successfully loaded.

title.label: Modal title
title.description: Heading shown at the top of the confirmation modal

confirmLabel.label: Confirm button
confirmLabel.description: Label on the primary confirm action button

alertMessage.label: Alert message
alertMessage.description: Body text explaining what the user is confirming

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Icon name displayed in the confirmation modal header

fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the confirmation action.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A detailed explanation of the action being confirmed.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the action.

fields.name: pendingId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the pending confirmation request.
